name: VICTOR VON DOOM
description:
Someone must've said my name three times and given a kiss, cause I'm back and ballin', ready for a brawlin', dropping bomber bots cause I never miss, and never bore. Just wait till you see what more I've got in store. Bots to make you cry, , feel fly, and like you never die.

Too late for music mania, but it's all the same. Just 'member: all caps when you spell the name.
creator: DragonMahBalls
